mapper.select: SELECT MN_KEYNO , HM.HM_SITE_PATH , SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(MN_URL,'/',2),'/',-1) TILES , (SELECT MN_NAME FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = MVD.MVD_MN_KEYNO) MN_NAME , MVD.MVD_DATA VIEW_DATA FROM s_menu_view_data MVD LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager MN ON MVD.MVD_MN_KEYNO = MN.MN_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_home_manager HM ON MN.MN_HOMEDIV_C = HM.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C WHERE MVD_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MVD_MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO}

SELECT (SELECT MN_NAME FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = MVD.MVD_MN_KEYNO) MN_NAME , (SELECT MN_URL FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MVD.MVD_MN_KEYNO = MN_KEYNO) MN_URL , MVH.MVH_DATA MVD_DATA FROM s_menu_view_data_history MVH LEFT JOIN s_menu_view_data MVD ON MVH.MVH_MVD_KEYNO = MVD.MVD_KEYNO WHERE MVH_KEYNO = #{MVH_KEYNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO s_menu_view_data_history( MVH_KEYNO, MVH_MVD_KEYNO, MVH_DATA, MVH_STDT, MVH_ENDT, MVH_MODNM, MVH_VERSION, MVH_COMMENT ) VALUES( #{MVH_KEYNO}, #{MVH_MVD_KEYNO}, #{MVH_DATA}, #{MVH_STDT}, now(), #{MVH_MODNM}, #{MVH_VERSION}, #{MVH_COMMENT} )
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(A.MVH_STDT,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') MVH_STDT , DATE_FORMAT(A.MVH_ENDT,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') MVH_ENDT , A.* , B.UI_ID MVD_MODNM FROM s_menu_view_data_history A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo B ON A.MVH_MODNM = B.UI_KEYNO WHERE MVH_MVD_KEYNO = #{MVD_KEYNO} AND MVH_DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY MVH_ENDT DESC

SELECT MVD_DATA FROM s_menu_view_data WHERE MVD_KEYNO = #{MVD_KEYNO} UNION ALL
( SELECT MVH_DATA MVD_DATA FROM s_menu_view_data_history WHERE MVH_MVD_KEYNO = ( SELECT MVH_MVD_KEYNO FROM s_menu_view_data_history WHERE MVH_KEYNO = #{MVH_KEYNO} ) AND MVH_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MVH_KEYNO <= #{MVH_KEYNO} ORDER BY MVH_STDT DESC LIMIT 2 )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO s_menu_view_data( MVD_KEYNO, MVD_MN_KEYNO, MVD_MN_HOMEDIV_C, MVD_DATA, MVD_REGDT, MVD_REGNM, MVD_EDITOR_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{MVD_KEYNO}, #{MVD_MN_KEYNO}, #{MVD_MN_HOMEDIV_C}, #{MVD_DATA}, now(), #{MVD_REGNM}, #{MVD_EDITOR_TYPE} )
mapper.update: UPDATE s_menu_view_data SET MVD_DATA = #{MVD_DATA}, MVD_MODDT = now(), MVD_MODNM = #{MVD_MODNM}, MVD_EDITOR_TYPE = #{MVD_EDITOR_TYPE}, MVD_DATA_SEARCH = #{MVD_DATA_SEARCH} WHERE MVD_KEYNO = #{MVD_KEYNO}
mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT MVD_KEYNO, MM.MN_NAME , CASE WHEN MM2.MN_URL IS NULL THEN MM.MN_FORWARD_URL WHEN MM.MN_URL IS NOT NULL THEN MM2.MN_URL END MVD_URL , UI_ID MVD_REGNM, DATE_FORMAT(MVD_REGDT,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS MVD_REGDT FROM s_menu_view_data MV LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager MM ON MV.MVD_MN_HOMEDIV_C = MM.MN_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager MM2 ON MV.MVD_MN_KEYNO = MM2.MN_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo UI ON MV.MVD_REGNM = UI.UI_KEYNO WHERE MVD_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MM.MN_NAME IS NOT NULL ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND MN_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND MVD_URL LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND MVD_REGNM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND MVD_REGDT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( MN_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR MVD_URL LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR MVD_REGNM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR MVD_REGDT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
)
